category_sources: source_facts.description says C++ search engine library; official Xapian site describes Xapian as an open source search engine library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xapian; official homepage title is The Xapian Project.
docs_sources: Official Xapian docs index is hosted at xapian.org/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Xapian Bleeding Edge page states the definitive git repo is git.xapian.org and gives git clone https://git.xapian.org/xapian.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says C++ search engine library; official Xapian homepage describes indexing and search facilities.
